'''pachodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickelodeon|nickelodeon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickelodeon|nickelodeon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pachodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæchedeth|pæchedeth]] || [[word:pæchedej|pæchedej]] || [[word:pæchedesh|pæchedesh]] || [[word:pæchede|pæchede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pachochodoth|pachochodoth]] || [[word:pachochodoj|pachochodoj]] || [[word:pachochodosh|pachochodosh]] || [[word:pachochodo|pachochodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pachodoth|pachodoth]] || [[word:pachodoj|pachodoj]] || [[word:pachodosh|pachodosh]] || [[word:pachodo|pachodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pachofdoth|pachofdoth]] || [[word:pachofdoj|pachofdoj]] || [[word:pachofdosh|pachofdosh]] || [[word:pachofdof|pachofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pachodotho|pachodotho]] || [[word:pachodojo|pachodojo]] || [[word:pachodosho|pachodosho]] || [[word:pachodoko|pachodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pachodoth|pachodoth]] || [[word:pachodoj|pachodoj]] || [[word:pachodosh|pachodosh]] || [[word:pachodo|pachodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pachodothol|pachodothol]] || [[word:pachodojol|pachodojol]] || [[word:pachodoshol|pachodoshol]] || [[word:pachodokol|pachodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pachodothotho|pachodothotho]] || [[word:pachodojojo|pachodojojo]] || [[word:pachodoshosho|pachodoshosho]] || [[word:pachodoko|pachodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pachodothon|pachodothon]] || [[word:pachodojon|pachodojon]] || [[word:pachodoshon|pachodoshon]] || [[word:pachodokon|pachodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pachodothoro|pachodothoro]] || [[word:pachodojoro|pachodojoro]] || [[word:pachodoshoro|pachodoshoro]] || [[word:pachodokoro|pachodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
